name: talk-like-ted
description: Carmine Gallo's Talk Like TED — master the 9 public-speaking secrets of the world's top TED presenters to deliver emotional, novel, and memorable presentations
useCase: Helps anyone craft and deliver TED-worthy presentations — from investor pitches and conference keynotes to team updates and virtual talks — using the 9-secrets framework across three categories: Emotional, Novel, and Memorable.
knownRisks: The 9-secrets framework requires practice — reading without rehearsing won't improve your speaking skills
Real TED talks at the actual conference involve a rigorous curation process; this skill trains presentation technique, not curation approval
